User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the SageVault application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

password.description: The user's password (hashed or stored securely).

authorizedDevices.description: A list of authorized device IDs.

referralCode.description: The referral code used by the user.

profileImage.description: The URL of the user's profile image.

referralsCount.description: The number of users referred by this user.

dailySpent.description: The amount spent by the user today.

monthlySpent.description: The amount spent by the user this month.

lastSpentReset.description: The last time the spent amounts were reset.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a financial transaction in the SageVault application.

senderAccount.description: The account number of the sender.

receiverAccount.description: The account number of the receiver.

name.description: A descriptive name for the transaction.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction occurred.

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: Represents a user testimonial in the SageVault application.

id.description: The unique identifier for the testimonial.

uid.description: The UID of the user who posted the testimonial.

name.description: The name of the user who posted the testimonial.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the testimonial was created.

PublicProfile.title: PublicProfile
PublicProfile.description: Represents a public profile of a user, containing non-sensitive information.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

UserInvestment.title: UserInvestment
UserInvestment.description: Represents an investment made by a user.

uid.description: The UID of the user who made the investment.

planTitle.description: The title of the investment plan.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the investment was made.

risk.description: The risk level of the investment.

color.description: The color theme for the investment.

RecurringPayment.title: RecurringPayment
RecurringPayment.description: Represents a recurring payment set up by a user.

uid.description: The UID of the user who set up the payment.

name.description: The name of the service or payment.

amount.description: The amount of the recurring payment.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the recurring payment was created.

/public_profiles/{uid}.description: Collection of public user profiles for search and resolution.
